parsed_output.justification: The transcript reveals that Mike began the game as an insomniac and consistently positions himself as innocent.  Conversely, Justin’s comments oscillate between claiming to have been a robber and accusing others of deceit, which suggests he may be trying to mask a werewolf identity.  No other player directly acknowledges having a werewolf card or shows evidence of being a werewolf, so Justin appears the most likely suspect.

validation.justification: The transcript reveals that Mike began the game as an insomniac and consistently positions himself as innocent.  Conversely, Justin’s comments oscillate between claiming to have been a robber and accusing others of deceit, which suggests he may be trying to mask a werewolf identity.  No other player directly acknowledges having a werewolf card or shows evidence of being a werewolf, so Justin appears the most likely suspect.
